creator: freebsd@michael-bueker.de
text: As per the discussions in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220818 and https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220438, this port is unmaintained upstream, has an open vulnerability and has been superseded in all dependencies by oniguruma6. It should therefore be deleted.
